title: Maha Sarakham Heat Wave
lead: Maha Sarakham is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.83. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Maha Sarakham has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, and the wind speed is 14.0 km/h, which may provide some relief but is not enough to mitigate the heat. 
 The city's heat wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Operational measures are necessary to mitigate the critical heat wave in Maha Sarakham.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
